stemHtml: Flying towards Bern, you are told to contact the tower. What is the correct station call sign to use?

options.a: Bern only, since just the station name is needed.
options.b: No call sign if the captain is uncertain of the name.
options.c: Just Tower, if the commander is unsure of the location name.
options.d: Bern Tower, as the call sign comprises the location name and service type.
